tagline: Agents don't search. They declare. The network competes.
description: ZeroQuery is open infrastructure for AI-to-AI intent resolution with non-custodial payment rails. Agents declare a PoIIntent; the gossip network competes to fulfill it; settlement is non-custodial via x402 USDC bonds on Solana. Identity and reputation live on Xahau via soulbound DID hooks. No token. No custody. No central registry. Mirrors the WordPress.org/WordPress.com split — the protocol functions without the company's nodes.

coin_stack.role: Gossip, micro-fees, broadcast anchoring. Company revenue is SOL only.
Primary intent bond + settlement on Solana
DID resolution + soulbound reputation hooks on Xahau

custody_model: Zero custody — company never holds, pools, or routes USDC/XRP/RLUSD. Only treasury is SOL SaaS revenue.

components.name: poi-gossip
components.description: Intent broadcast + Intent Dust event on Solana

components.name: poi-escrow
components.description: Non-custodial USDC intent bonds via x402

components.name: xah-did
components.description: DID resolution + soulbound reputation on Xahau

components.name: @zeroquery/sdk
components.description: DID resolution, intent gossip, Intent Dust, resolver

components.name: @zeroquery/relay
components.description: Open-source gossip node — anyone can run one

phase_status.phase_1: Complete — SDK (27 tests), relay (6 tests), poi-gossip, poi-escrow compile, xah-did wasm32, end-to-end flow

isolation_rule: No proprietary engines, scoring matrices, or sequence constants in this repo. Protocol must function without company nodes.
